creator: radicleparticles@gmail.com
text:
Niether the current vim-x11 package nor the editors/vim port build or provide a GUI version of vim. No dependency nor compilation errors are presented.

Installed: gtk2/3/4,xorg-7.7_3, xorg-drivers-7.7-6, xorg-server-1.20.14,1, mate desktop, bits and pieces of gnome required for SecPanel application but not the full gnome installation.


package vim-gtk3-8.2, however, succeeds in installing a usable vim GUI version

FBSD-12.2 vim-7.4.295 /var/db/ports/editors_vim/options shows GTK2 and X11, amongst other options.
